creator: jdp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I have added the patch you submitted.  Thanks! 

A result code of 0 is incorrect according to RFC2637.  However, it is 
harmless to tolerate the erroneous result code. 

I too have tried to contact the pptp-linux maintainer in the past, 
without receiving any reply.  Clearly he's not maintaining this 
software any more.
